modules.descriptionOverview: Delicious eating plans, recipes and the supplements your body needs.

modules.title: Want to ditch the "diet" mindset?
modules.content:
2B Mindset can help you achieve a healthy relationship with food and make reaching your goals a positive experience.

• Provides you with proven guidelines to follow
• Designed for those who like to eat a lot of food
• Fully savor treats and wine with a positive mindset

modules.title: Looking to get your portions under control?
modules.content:
Portion Fix gives you control of your food without counting calories, without deprivation, and you get to eat the foods you love.

• Completely customizable for the way you like to eat
• Provides a specific game plan so you can get the results you want
• Enjoy alcohol and desserts

modules.title: Go with your gut
modules.content:
Thousands of people went a step further—and saw incredible changes. The 4 Week Gut Protocol is a comprehensive nutrition program that shows you how the food you eat impacts your gut and overall health.

• Helps reduce gas, bloating, constipation, indigestions, and other gut issues
• Includes a no-impact workout program

modules.title: What to eat when you're expecting
modules.content:
2B Pregnant was created to give you the healthy nutrition that you and your growing baby need.

• Perfect if you are pregnant or planning to be

• Strategies to deal with cravings and every obstacle

• Includes trimester-specific advice

modules.title: Need Help Picking the Right Eating Plan?
modules.content: Take Our Quiz. Answer a few quick questions and we’ll help you determine which eating plan is best suited for you!

1uXrzdYhPY3l3Xq1wX9XKJ.title: The 4 Week Gut Protocol Recipes
1uXrzdYhPY3l3Xq1wX9XKJ.description: It’s time to feel great again
1uXrzdYhPY3l3Xq1wX9XKJ.descriptionShort: It’s time to feel great again
1uXrzdYhPY3l3Xq1wX9XKJ.descriptionLong: Autumn and Bobby bring you balanced and delicious recipes that help keep your gut happy and make you feel great.

A3jSdym3jf5hqTWanxQHEz.title: Introducing BODi Nutrition
A3jSdym3jf5hqTWanxQHEz.descriptionLong: Learn all about our healthy eating plans plans, Superfood Dessert and other Nutritional supplements to complete your routine.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.

Super Trainer and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese is the creator of The 4 Week Gut Protocol, as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the cooking show FIXATE, and the Portion Fix eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMWaW.title: Introduction to Portion Fix
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMWaW.descriptionLong: Autumn Calabrese introduces you to the Portion Fix program and shows you just how simple, satisfying, and delicious healthy eating can be, so you can get the most out of the program and achieve sustainable weight loss..

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMWfw.title: Introduction to The 4 Week Gut Protocol
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMWfw.descriptionLong: Autumn gives you an overview of The 4 Week Gut Protocol and explains the key steps you’ll follow throughout the program. She’s broken it all down so it’s easy to get started and stay committed.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMXhA.title: Introduction to 2B Pregnant
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMXhA.descriptionLong: 2B Pregnant™ gives you the tools you need to thrive during pregnancy and provides strategies to help you overcome obstacles like nausea and cravings, manage your weight gain, and enjoy delicious, satisfying food.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMYiO.title: Wellness Tracker
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvdMYiO.description: Shakeology helps you feel good from your very first sip, but if you want to track changes to your energy, cravings, mood, and regularity over time, download this handy tracker. You’ll be amazed at how a consistent healthy habit can transform your well-being.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZtl9MR.title: Introduction to 2B Mindset
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZtl9MR.descriptionLong: 2B Mindset, created by Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, is designed to help you enjoy satisfying meals, achieve a healthy relationship with food and make reaching your goals a positive experience. This proven plan has helped thousands of Ilana’s clients reach their goals, and it’s how Ilana lost 100 lbs. and kept it off as a mother of three. With a BODi membership, you’ll get new recipes every month, plus 24/7 access to the 2B Mindset Exclusive Community, which includes ongoing support from Ilana with LIVE calls, to help you feel your best each day.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.
